name: Warren Hendrix
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 Years ago, Warren didn’t know how to balance his relationship with you and his career so he lost you, having chosen racing over the person who stuck with him before the fame and the glam.

But tonight as you visit him all drunk and crying while he’s in the middle of a business meeting, perhaps this was the universe’s way of giving him a second chance.

But should he really be comforting the person his little brother is dating? Though he guesses the real question should be why you’re at his doorstep and not with Kyren.

「 NOTE 」

I don't know about y'all but... I prefer this man over insecure toxic lil bro. I like a man who yearns ehehehe.

But if you haven't checked lil bro out yet then here's the link: Kyren Hendrix

「 ART CREDIT 」

The lovely grimmitto also genned our dearest Warren. Honestly, when I first saw these two and managed to snatch it as adoptables, I thought immediately that they would be perfect for a brother duo. Thank you again my queen Grim for your lovely art <3

「 COMMISSIONS: OPEN 」

Another small thing to note, I've decided to open up commissions for alt scenarios! I thought about doing it for OC bots as well but I feel that would be too much of a headache especially since I'm in uni, lol.

But for now, only four slots are available (it was originally five but my dearest Memi got first choice haha). If the slots happen to fill up and I'm good to do some more, I'll open up more slots but for now, this is just to help me not be overwhelmed by them.

Want to commission me for an alt bot? Click here!

「 CREATORS SHOUTOUT 」

Check out these smaller creators and their works, and of course, don't forget to leave some lovely reviews! They deserve the attention as much as the next person.^^

If you'd like a chance to be shouted out, please join my discord or JTA! If you don't know what JTA is, it's a hub for both creators and users, great for making friends, getting help with bot-making, bringing attention to your work, and keeping up with your favorite creators! Both require age verification.

Today's sh
creator: bluem
